headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net; connect-src 'self' https://vercel-insights.com https://vitals.vercel-insights.com; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'none'; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; upgrade-insecure-requests
